imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Historic sepia-toned exterior photograph style illustration of a classic early 1900s brick elementary school building with period-accurate architectural details, labeled '1902' (mckinley-1902.dim_600x400.png)
- Bright modern interior gymnasium of an elementary school with hardwood floors, basketball hoops, and bleachers in a contemporary Pacific Northwest school setting (mckinley-gymnasium-current.dim_600x400.png)

existing_features.title: Update the right column of the AboutSection component to display two images side-by-side: a historic 1902 photo of McKinley Elementary School in Spokane, WA on the left, and a current gymnasium photo of McKinley Elementary School in Spokane, WA on the right. Each image should be clearly labeled (e.g., '1902' and 'Today' or 'Historic' and 'Current Gymnasium'). The layout must remain visually balanced within the two-column About section.

projectName: Update About Section Right Column to Side-by-Side McKinley School Photos
